name: Borqs Technologies, Inc.
business: Borqs Technologies, Inc. provides customizable, differentiated, and scalable Android-based smart connected devices and cloud service solutions. Its Connected Solutions business unit sells software and hardware to mobile chipset manufacturers, device OEMs, and operators. Its MVNO business unit provides mobile communication services as a virtual network operator in China.
namedCustomers: Intel Asia-Pacific Research and Development Ltd.

exposures.sentence: We are a leading provider of commercial grade Android platform software for mobile chipset manufacturers, mobile device OEMs and mobile operators, as well as complete product solutions of mobile connected devices for enterprise and consumer applications.
We provide mobile communication services as a mobile virtual network operator in China.

On January 8, 2018, we entered into a letter of intent to acquire a 60% equity interest in Shanghai KADI Machinery Technology Co., Ltd ( KADI ), a Chinese company that develops software and hardware solutions for electric vehicle control modules, such as charging, battery management and vehicle controls.
The BorqsWare Client Software platform has been used in Android phones, tablets, watches and various Internet-of-things ( IoT ) devices.

catalysts.event: Letter of intent to acquire 60% of KADI for electric vehicle control modules
catalysts.sentence: On January 8, 2018, we entered into a letter of intent to acquire a 60% equity interest in Shanghai KADI Machinery Technology Co., Ltd ( KADI ), a Chinese company that develops software and hardware solutions for electric vehicle control modules, such as charging, battery management and vehicle controls.

catalysts.event: Filing of registration statement for public offering
catalysts.sentence: We plan to raise funds in the coming months by way of a public offering of shares for which we have filed a registration statement on Form S-1 on February 14, 2018.

catalysts.event: MIIT issues draft notice on official commercial use of MVNO
catalysts.sentence: The MIIT issued a Notice on the Official Commercial Use of Mobile Communication Resale Business (Draft for Comments) on January 24, 2018.
